entry.title: New: Bill 34, CD1 (2025) (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
"A BILL FOR AN ORDINANCE AMENDING THE FISCAL YEAR 2025 BUDGET FOR THE COUNTY OF MAUI, OFFICE OF THE MAYOR, ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT PROGRAM, GRANTS AND DISBURSEMENTS FOR CULTURE, ARTS, AND TOURISM, WAILUKU FILM FESTIVAL" The purpose of this bill is to amend the Fiscal Year 2025 Budget by amending Section 3.B.12.c.(3)(viii), Office of the Mayor, Economic Development Program, by changing the appropriation’s name from “Maui Film Festival” to “Maui Economic Development Board, Inc. for the Wailuku Film Festival.”

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
